title: Forest (Exemption for Export of Pine Round Wood Logs) Order, 2003
title_en: Forest (Exemption for Export of Pine Round Wood Logs) Order, 2003

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Forest (Exemption for Export of Pine Round Wood Logs) Order, 2003.

provisions.title: Exemption
provisions.content: M/s. Tanganyika Wattle Company Ltd. (TANWAT) is hereby exempted from the application of Government Notice No. 266 of 1993 .

provisions.title: Duration
provisions.content: This Order shall be valid for eighteen months efective from the exeport date of the first consignment.
Logs allowed for export shall be only those harvested from the company’s plantation situated in Njombe District.

provisions.title: FD hammer and Transit Pass
provisions.content: Each consignment shall, before transportation to Dar es Salaam harbour be inspected at the plantation site, marked with FD hammer and issued with a Transit Pass.

provisions.title: Export rules and conditions
provisions.content: The Company shall adhere to all export rules and conditions.

The exemption provided for in this Order may, subject to the fulfilmet of these conditions, be renewed for another period of eighteen months.
